subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 747839931/240912555 is not a GRB
body:
S. Bala (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 747839931/240912555 at 13:18:46.79 UT
on 12 September 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles.
